pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 specifications, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use source and target level 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target 21 configuration, the compiler may default to an older version or the property value, potentially causing compilation errors for Java 21-specific syntax or failing to enforce the target bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Enable preview features in the Maven compiler plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 preview features will fail to compile without the --enable-preview flag.

pom.xml.general_idea: Enable preview features in the Maven Surefire plugin for test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests using Java 21 preview features will fail to run or compile within the test phase without the --enable-preview argLine.
